# CLIMATRIX

> Carbon accounting and sustainability platform for SMEs, mid-market companies and
> manufacturers. Scope 1-3 GHG inventory with AI-powered data import, EU CBAM compliance,
> product carbon footprints (PCF, ISO 14067 / PACT v3), streamlined LCA (EF 3.1) and
> EN 15804+A2 EPD generation, plus a read-only verifier portal for third-party assurance.
> Transparent pricing from $99/month with a 14-day free trial. Web app at
> https://app.climatrix.co; company site at https://climatrix.co.

Climatrix (climatrix.co) is not affiliated with climatrix.earth or any other
similarly named company.

## What Climatrix does

- Corporate Carbon Footprint (CCF): full Scope 1, 2, 3 inventory per GHG Protocol and
  ISO 14064-1, with VSME, ESRS and CDP exports.
- AI Smart Import: upload invoices, utility bills and spreadsheets as they are; the
  platform extracts activities, grounds each row in a published emission factor, and
  keeps a per-row derivation story for auditability.
- Decarbonization planning: SBTi-aligned targets, an initiative library, reduction
  scenarios with capex/savings, and progress tracking.
- CBAM: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism module — 50-tonne exemption checker,
  imports register with embedded-emissions calculation, quarterly and annual
  declaration support.
- PCF: product carbon footprints per ISO 14067 with BOM modeling, supplier PCF
  ingestion and PACT v3 data exchange.
- LCA: 16 EF 3.1 impact categories across EN 15804 lifecycle modules, computed on the
  same product models.
- EPD: EN 15804+A2 Environmental Product Declarations with a verification workflow,
  PDF and ILCD+EPD digital formats.
- Verifier portal: third-party verifiers get token-scoped read-only access to the
  inventory with full provenance — evidence review without spreadsheet exports.

## Pages

- [Home](https://climatrix.co/): product overview
- [Features](https://climatrix.co/features): the full tool chain in detail
- [Pricing](https://climatrix.co/pricing): published plans — Starter $99/month,
  Professional $3,560/year, one-time Report Pass $1,790, add-on modules
- [Demo](https://climatrix.co/demo): guided demo and free CBAM exemption checker
